projectDescription: A high-performance Steam market data ingestion engine designed to overcome strict rate limits, providing structured time-series data for quantitative analysis.
keyFeatures: Sliding-window rate limiter enforcing Steam's 15 req/min limit
Urgency-based real-time scheduler for live market data
Fixed-interval batch scheduler for historical price snapshots
Async Python architecture with shared rate limiting across schedulers
SQLite storage with four specialized tables for different data types
Automatic retry with exponential backoff for transient errors
Pydantic data validation for type safety across the pipeline
publicApiSurface: RateLimiter - Sliding window rate limiting class
SteamAPIClient - Async Steam API client with four endpoints
priceoverview endpoint - Current market prices and volume
itemordershistogram endpoint - Full order book snapshots
itemordersactivity endpoint - Recent trade activity feed
pricehistory endpoint - Historical hourly price data
config.yaml - Configuration file for tracked items and rate limits
SQLite database - Four tables: price_overview, orders_histogram, orders_activity, price_history
